---
title: "Results Figures"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---



## Load libraries and results


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}

df <- read_excel(file.path('manuscript', 'casestudies_classification_metrics.xlsx') )

df <- read_csv(file.path('manuscript', 'casestudies_classification_metrics.csv') )


```


```{r}

table_results <- df %>%
  select(dataset, threshold, predicted, tp, fp, tn, fn, fpr, fnr) %>%
  arrange(threshold, dataset)

table_results_fmt <- table_results %>%
  mutate(
    fpr = round(fpr, 3),
    fnr = round(fnr, 3),
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = c("Baseline", "Filtered"))
  )


library(knitr)

kable(
  table_results_fmt,
  caption = "Classification performance metrics across thresholds for baseline and filtered datasets."
)


```








## Plot
```{r}

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(fpr, fnr),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  )


```

```{r}
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = class_thld, y = value, color = metric)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Classification threshold",
    y = "Rate",
    color = "Metric"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
